repo.description: Simple examples that help you get started with Appwrite + Android (=❤️)

terms.context_snippet: Appwrite playground for Android is a simple way to explore the Appwrite API & Appwrite Android SDK. Use the source code of this page to learn how to use the different Appwrite Android SDK features.
